content_type: enforcement-action photo with agency branding overlay
description: Photograph of an ICE removal operation branded with agency graphics into a card. The photograph, shot on an airport tarmac under a blue sky, shows a young man in a gray t-shirt and dark jacket standing facing the camera, flanked from behind by two officers wearing high-visibility orange safety vests: the left vest reads 'S.A.F.E.' and the right vest reads 'ICE', with a marker '4' on a wall behind. In the lower-left corner are the gray U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal, the white 'ICE' wordmark, a blue 'LEARN MORE' button, and the URL 'ICE.gov/newsroom' in white. The officers' faces are turned away. Tweet text: 'This Salvadoran fugitive - wanted for aggravated homicide and terrorist organization - no longer threatens Americans. We finally removed him.'
